evidence.scientific_clarity: Violin+box+jitter layout clearly shows dose-dependent viability reduction Control→Drug-A 10µM→50µM→Combo; medians and distributions are unambiguous; significance brackets computed via Mann-Whitney U and rendered correctly.
evidence.typography: pdf.fonttype=42 and svg.fonttype='none' set in rcParams; font stack prefers Arial/Helvetica over DejaVu Sans; consistent 9–10 pt sizing throughout with clean axis labels.
evidence.palette: Okabe-Ito colorblind-safe palette used (#0072B2, #E69F00, #D55E00, #CC79A7); palette is categorical (one hue per condition), no red/green used for direction—appropriate for the data type.
evidence.layout_density: Single-panel 7×4.5 in figure; four conditions fill horizontal space with 0.35–4.65 x-range; y-range starts at 0 with bracket headroom; no overlapping labels; tight_layout applied.
evidence.reviewer_readiness: Caption matches figure content exactly (violin, box, jitter, median lines, significance brackets, n=100); legend not needed (x-axis labels serve that role); no gratuitous elements.
evidence.vector_fidelity: Script sets pdf.fonttype=42 and ps.fonttype=42; post-save byte-scan verifies no /Type3 fonts; figure.pdf saved via matplotlib savefig ensuring real vector output.
evidence.file_format: All four required files present: figure.pdf, figure.png, figure.svg (bonus), caption.tex, gen_figure.py — all non-trivial with substantial content.
evidence.caption_quality: Caption names the scientific finding (dose-dependent reduction), provides a specific numerical claim (median viability ≈0.35 for Combo vs 1.00 Control), describes all visual elements (violin, box, jitter, α=0.35), and defines significance notation.

overall_strengths: Complete, publication-ready figure with all required files, correct colorblind-safe Okabe-Ito palette, and proper vector font settings (pdf.fonttype=42).
Caption is exemplary: contains a specific quantitative finding, describes every visual element, and defines statistical notation—ready for submission without revision.
overall_weaknesses: Minor: significance bracket for Drug-A 10µM is labeled 'ns' but the p-value is dynamically computed—if the simulated data happen to yield p<0.05 the label would mismatch the caption claim; a runtime check is included but the hard-coded 'ns' default in the comparisons list could mislead.
Minor: jitter width (±0.18) slightly exceeds the box half-width (±0.12), so scattered points can visually overlap neighboring violin bodies at high density—a narrower jitter (±0.12) would be cleaner.
